mapper.sql: select d.dept_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.dept_name, d.dept_name_en, d.order_num, d.leader, d.phone, d.email, d.status, d.del_flag, d.create_by, d.create_time from sys_dept d
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_user where dept_id = #{deptId} and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from sys_dept where del_flag = '0' and parent_id = #{deptId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_dept( dept_id, parent_id, dept_name, dept_name_en, ancestors, order_num, leader, phone, email, status, create_by, create_time )values( #{deptId}, #{parentId}, #{deptName}, #{deptNameEn}, #{ancestors}, #{orderNum}, #{leader}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{createBy}, now() )
mapper.update:
update sys_dept set status = '0' where dept_id in
#{deptId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE DEPT_ID = #{deptId} AND STATUS = '0' AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
SELECT * FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE STATUS = '0' AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
